items.title: qwen-lora-finetune
items.summary: Fine-tune Qwen2.5-Coder for code generation on your own dataset using QLoRA. Train on JSONL instruction-response pairs and produce a shareable ~16 MB LoRA adapter.
items.summary_cn: 使用QLoRA对Qwen2.5-Coder进行微调，以便在您自己的数据集上生成代码。培训JSONL指令-响应对，并生产可共享的约16 MB LoRA适配器。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: AgriGenie-AI
items.summary: An AI-powered smart farming platform that helps farmers with crop recommendations, weather insights, and an intelligent AI assistant using Streamlit and Google Gemini.
items.summary_cn: 一个人工智能驱动的智能农业平台，可帮助农民提供作物推荐、天气洞察以及使用Streamlit和Google Gemini的智能人工智能助手。
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: From Fixed to Free Cameras: Calibration-Free View-Robust Vision-Language-Action Model
items.title_cn: 从固定摄像头到自由摄像头：无校准视野-健壮的视觉-语言动作模型
items.summary: Real-world robot deployment rarely maintains the training-stage camera setup, where cameras often experience repositioning or remounting depending on actual scenarios. Existing view-robust Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies tolerate such camera variations only when the camera extrinsics are expli...
items.summary_cn: 真实世界的机器人部署很少维护训练阶段的摄像头设置，摄像头通常会根据实际情况进行重新定位或重新安装。现有的视觉-强健的视觉-语言-操作（ VLA ）政策仅在相机外在特性得到解释时才允许此类相机变体...
items.comment: 社区狂欢，实际部署成本你考虑过吗？

items.title: Weak-to-Strong Generalization via Direct On-Policy Distillation
items.title_cn: 通过直接按政策蒸馏从弱到强的泛化
items.summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is a powerful recipe for improving language-model reasoning, but it is expensive to repeat on every new strong model because the target model must generate many rollouts during training. As models scale, post-training itself becomes a bottleneck....
items.summary_cn: 具有可验证奖励的强化学习（ RLVR ）是改进语言模型推理的强大配方，但在每个新的强模型上重复使用都是昂贵的，因为目标模型必须在训练期间生成许多推广。随着模型规模的扩大，后期培训本身就成为一个瓶颈。...
items.comment: AI 模型迭代快得飞起，有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: Interpretable Human-Label-Free Deep Learning for Real-Bogus Classification with Uncertainty Quantification
items.title_cn: 用于具有不确定性定量的真伪分类的可解释的无人标记深度学习
items.summary: Time-domain surveys generate many transient candidates, making Real-Bogus classification a critical step in automated discovery pipelines. Reliable labels are costly, while community labels can be noisy and survey-dependent. We aim to develop a Real-Bogus classification framework that can be trained...
items.summary_cn: 时域调查产生了许多短暂的候选者，使得Real-Bogus分类成为自动化发现管道中的关键步骤。可靠的标签成本高昂，而社区标签可能嘈杂且依赖于调查。我们的目标是开发一个可以训练的Real-Bogus分类框架...
items.comment: 商业化产品发布，先看定价策略，再决定要不要入坑。

items.title: The first American autonomous ground vehicles are fighting in Ukraine
items.title_cn: 首批美国自动地面车辆正在乌克兰作战
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
items.title_cn: “第一次” AI运行的勒索软件攻击仍然需要人类
items.summary: An AI agent carried out the technical execution of a real-world ransomware attack for the first known time, but new details show a human still chose the victim, set up the infrastructure, and supplied stolen credentials — meaning it wasn't quite the fully autonomous cybercrime debut that last week's headlines suggested.
items.summary_cn: 一名人工智能代理首次对真实世界的勒索软件攻击进行了技术执行，但新的细节显示，人类仍然选择了受害者，设置了基础设施，并提供了被盗的凭据--这意味着这不是上周头条新闻所暗示的完全自主的网络犯罪首次亮相。
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
items.title_cn: 美国投资者将很快获得SK海力士，另一家驾驭人工智能热潮的内存制造商
items.summary: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.
items.summary_cn: SK海力士正在经历一场归功于人工智能的繁荣。预计将于周五在美国进行数十亿美元的首次公开募股。
items.comment: AI 领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。
